case_title: LARRY CHAN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER CHAN, LARRY AS TO RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF PAUL CHIGNELL IN SUPPORT OF REPLY TO OPPOSITION OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100030936) FILED BY PETITIONER CHAN, LARRY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER LARRY CHAN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 20, 2018 TO GIVE THE CITY AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WITH THE REPLY PAPERS. PER JAY V. MAHAFFEY (2013) 218 CAL. APP. 4TH 1522, THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO CONSIDER THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LARRY CHAN WITH HIS REPLY PAPERS. THE CITY MAY FILE SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 13, 2018. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER LARRY CHAN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 5, 2018 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances are made by or for the parties.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

RULING: PETITIONER LARRY CHAN'S Motion For Attorney's Fees is off calendar. The case was dismissed on March 22, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Continued To Apr-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER LARRY CHAN's Motion For Attorney'S Fees is continued to April 5, 2018 per agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Advanced From Feb-20-18 To Mar-15-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER LARRY CHAN's Motion For Attorney's Fees.

Continued to March 15, 2018. The City may file supplemental opposition papers by March 1, 2018. The parties may seek a hearing new date by contesting the tentative ruling, since they failed to communicate an agreed upon date to the court, by February 16, 2018, 11 a.m.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER LARRY CHAN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES is CONTINUED to February 20, 2018 to give the City an opportunity to respond to the evidence submitted with the reply papers. Per Jay v. Mahaffey (2013) 218 Cal. App. 4th 1522, the court exercises its discretion to consider the evidence submitted by plaintiff Larry Chan with his reply papers. The City may file supplemental opposition papers no later than February 13, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
